note: MOCK DATA for UI development only. Not live, not from any API.

games.headline: Division rematch turns on two shaky bullpens
games.summary: The Yankees come in swinging a hot road bat while Boston's relief corps has leaked runs all week. The middle innings are where the leverage sits — whichever pen blinks first likely decides the tone.

games.headline: Two aces line up in a low-scoring script
games.summary: Both starters have been missing bats, so run-scoring may be at a premium. Expect the story to hinge on one swing or one defensive miscue rather than a big inning.

games.headline: AL West tilt with real standings weight
games.summary: Seattle is surging just as Houston's offense has gone quiet. With barely a game separating them, the winner takes a real step in the division picture.

teams.name: Mariners
teams.headline: Quietly the hottest team in the AL West
teams.summary: The bats have finally caught up to the pitching, and a +22 run differential over ten days says the surge is real rather than lucky. Strikeouts remain the one thing keeping this from a runaway stretch.

teams.name: Tigers
teams.headline: Rotation carrying an inconsistent lineup
teams.summary: Detroit's starters keep games close, but the offense has been feast-or-famine. The heavy one-run-game workload shows how thin the margins have been night to night.

teams.name: Cubs
teams.headline: Power spike masking a bullpen wobble
teams.summary: The Cubs are slugging their way to competitive games, but late-inning leads haven't been safe. The homers are keeping the record afloat while the relief group sorts itself out.

players.name: Aaron Judge
players.headline: On a power surge — 6 HR in the last 8 games
players.summary: Judge is barreling everything and, notably, chasing less — a combination that tends to sustain. The power output is the headline, but the improved plate discipline is what makes this stretch look repeatable.

players.name: Bobby Witt Jr.
players.headline: Doing damage on the bases and in the gaps
players.summary: Witt is impacting games with extra-base hits and aggressive baserunning. The one caution flag is an unusually high BABIP, which suggests some of the batting average may cool even if the underlying contact stays strong.

players.name: Tarik Skubal
players.headline: Missing bats at a career-best clip
players.summary: Skubal is pairing elite strikeout stuff with pinpoint control and soft contact. When a starter is this far ahead in all three, the recent run of dominant outings reads as skill, not variance.
